history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe path toward the goal at row 08 column H is to go downward from my current position, which means I need to turn right to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), so I should move forward toward the lower area where the goal is located.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe. I should continue downward toward the open path leading to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B and facing down. The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would go to row 05 column B, which is safe, so the best next step is to continue downward toward the open area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 06 column B is safe (`.`), while the left and right nearby paths are blocked by lava patterns. Moving forward keeps me on the safe route toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 07 column B is safe, while turning is not necessary yet. Moving forward brings me closer to the open area below and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down, but the cell in front of me (row 08 column B) is safe floor. However, the goal is at row 08 column H, and the safest immediate move is to go down into the open corridor below, then navigate right toward the goal. So I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing down. The cell directly in front of me (row 09 column B) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my right at row 08 column H, and the safe path along row 08 is open, so I should first turn right to face toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing left (`<`). The cell directly in front of me is row 08 column A, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 08 column H, I need to turn to face right first. The safest next step is to turn around by turning left once from left-facing to down-facing, but that still won't help toward the goal. Turning right from left-facing will make me face up, which also doesn't directly move me toward the goal. Since I need to begin navigating toward the open path on the right, the best immediate action is to turn right to face up and then continue repositioning.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is on row 08 column H, so I need to move right along the current row. To face right from up, I should turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is to my right at row 08 column H, and the cells between are all safe floor cells. So the next move should be to go forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H. The cells to the right at D, E, F, G, and H are all safe floor/goal cells, so the best next step is to move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is on the same row at column H, and the cells between me and the goal are clear floor cells, so I should move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H, and the cells between me and the goal on row 08 are safe floor cells. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without touching lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F and I am facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 08 column H, and the cell directly ahead at row 08 column G is safe (`.`). I should move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is immediately to my right at row 08 column G, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
